pageContext.name: Galactus: The Devourer Variant
pageContext.description: This planet shall sustain me until it has been drained of all elemental life! So speaks Galactus!   Sideshow Art Prints presents the Galactus: The Devourer Variant Fine Art Print, an explosive new Marvel art print by artist Doaly. This alternate color presentation uses cooler colors to give the galactic scene a stylish new appearance.  It's a colorful cosmic calamity in the mighty Marvel manner! Artist Doaly renders a chilling take on the ceaseless hunger that is Galactus, the Devourer of Worlds. The Silver Surfer has summoned his master to a grouping of worlds to fuel his never-ending needs, as the planet in the center is broken apart in a shower of blinding brightness. Even the boundaries of the image border cannot contain Galactus' unstoppable energy, as the Power Cosmic radiates outward to form a full bleed giclée design that is bursting with detail and destruction.  Each Galactus: The Devourer Variant Fine Art Print features an authorized, automated artist signature and an embossed Seal of Authenticity as a part of the limited edition of 350 pieces. Pair this Galactus wall art with the Galactus Maquette or Silver Surfer Maquette by Sideshow, each sold separately, for a Marvel Comics display packed with crackling cosmic power.  He hungers for a new world! Consume your collection with the presence of the Galactus: The Devourer Variant Fine Art Print by Doaly today.
